description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and large floor-to-ceiling windows dominating two sides of the structure. The exterior is primarily white with a clean, minimalist aesthetic, complemented by a spacious wooden deck that includes outdoor seating and a vertical garden wall. The main entryway is set beneath a row of expansive windows, with a simple blue door providing access. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper and lower levels both featuring extensive glazing for natural light. The rear and side facades are more solid, with minimal or no windows, emphasizing privacy. The overall look is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a wooden deck with outdoor seating and a vertical garden. The design is minimalist and features clean white walls and a prominent blue entry door.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entryway, large glass windows, and the wooden deck with outdoor seating and a vertical garden wall.
description_view_1: This angle shows the full expanse of the glass facade and the deck area, emphasizing the open, airy feel and the lush vertical garden.
description_view_2: This side view displays the double-height glass windows and the solid, windowless rear section of the house.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a mostly solid white wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing privacy and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple blue door beneath large windows, flush with the facade, adjacent to a wooden deck and vertical garden, no porch or overhang.
